content_gaps: The specific tools used in hand-forging jewelry (hammers, anvils, torches) are mentioned but rarely shown or explained in detail. [2]
Detailed care instructions for hand-forged jewelry are almost entirely absent. Most pages focus on the creation process and durability benefits.
The sensory experience—the weight, texture, and unique feel of a hand-forged piece compared to a cast one—is mentioned anecdotally but not explored in depth. [1]
The distinction between "hand-forged," "hand-fabricated," and "handmade" is often blurred or used interchangeably. A clear, comparative definition is needed. [3, 4]

While durability is a key selling point, the content often misses explaining *why* the compressed metal grain structure leads to better longevity and resistance to scratches and bending in practical, everyday terms. [15, 16, 17]
